title: AL's Skeleton Quivers
description: A pack that gives Skeletons Quivers!
body:
![Skeleton Quivers logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e9bb1fed68c5219762e5204d07b0da03603b851.png)

# 

This pack gives Skeletons, Strays, and Bogged Quivers!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WUuHEOkPho4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Features:

*Quiver models for Skeleton, Stray, and Bogged

*special Enchantment-dependent quiver textures





Note: The reason why it's compatible with Fresh Animations, despite FA using custom models, is because this pack uses the JPM system which is used by FA.

You can also reference the load order given in the Images tab to know how to pair it with other packs.

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
